creator: nakaji@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
>>>>>	NAKAJI Hiroyuki <nakaji@jp.freebsd.org> wrote:

> I put "diff -urNb samba33 samba34" at
> http://www.heimat.gr.jp/~nakaji/FreeBSD/ports/net/samba33-34.diff

> I'll check again my update. Thanks.

The samba33/files/patch-* can be merged into samba34, except
patch-nsswitch__wins_freebsd.c.

Samba 3.4.5 has nsswitch/winbind_nss_freebsd.c and uses it. And I cannot
understand the difference between wins_freebsd.c of 3.3.9 and
winbind_nss_freebsd.c of 3.4.5.

I have updated my patch. Please check.
http://www.heimat.gr.jp/~nakaji/FreeBSD/ports/net/samba33-34-20100124.diff
-- 
NAKAJI Hiroyuki
